records.ety: [OE. ginger, gingever, gingivere, OF. gengibre, gingimbre, F. gingembre, L. zingiber, zingiberi, fr. Gr. <?/; of Oriental origin; cf. Ar. & Pers. zenjebīl, fr. Skr. çgavëra, prop., hornshaped; <?/<?/<?/ga horn + vëra body.]

defs: A plant of the genus Zingiber, of the East and West Indies. The species most known is Zingiber officinale.
The hot and spicy rootstock of Zingiber officinale, which is much used in cookery and in medicine.
